items.name: Wit Maga (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 6.3% ) A Zesty, Citrusy And Spicy Sip, Aka Sunshine In A Mug! This Is A Traditional Wheat Beer Known For Its Hazy, Pale Appearance And Refreshing Flavor. Originating From Belgium, It Is Brewed With A Significant Proportion Of Wheat (Usually Around 50%) And Barley Malt.Key Ingredients Include Coriander Seeds And Orange Peel (Both Sweet And Bitter Varieties), Which Impart Citrusy, Zesty, And Herbal Notes

items.name: Happy Weizen (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 5.5% ) Cloudy. Golden. Refreshing. Just What You Need For Warm Lazy Days. Hefeweizen Is A Traditional German Wheat Beer Known For Its Hazy Appearance And Unique, Complex Flavor Profile. The Word

items.name: El Chamraj (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 5.0% ) Your Chill Point, With A Hint Of Sweetness! Mexican Lager Is A Light And Crisp Beer Style That Is Known For Its Refreshing Qualities, Making It A Popular Choice, Especially In Warm Climates. Characterized By Its Pale Golden Color And Moderate Carbonation, This Lager Is Typically Brewed Using Pale Malt And Maze, Resulting In A Clean And Smooth Flavor Profile. The Taste Of Mexican Lager Is Often Mildly Sweet With A Subtle Maltiness, Balanced By A Light Hop Bitterness That Is Usually Low To Moderate.

items.name: Nandi Nectar (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 5.5% ) For All Your Smooth, Spicy, Refreshing And Sweet Cravings; From The Forests Of India. Honey Witbier Is A Delightful Variation Of The Traditional Belgian Witbier, Known For Its Refreshing Qualities And Subtle Sweetness. This Style Combines The Characteristics Of Classic Witbier With The Added Complexity And Flavor Of Honey, Creating A Unique And Enjoyable Brew. The Flavor Profile Of Honey Witbier Is Well-Balanced, With The Natural Sweetness Of Honey Complementing The Wheat Malts Lightness.

items.name: Ale Is Well (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 7.4% ) Fruit-Forward Ipa With Vibrant Tropical Notes, A Medium Body, And A Smooth, Refreshing Finish Bright Citrus And Pine Hop Character With Notes Of Grapefruit Zest, Resin, And Light Tropical Hints. Clean Malt Background Keeps The Profile Crisp And Focused On Hop Expression.

items.name: Rassela Cider  (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 5.0% ) Cider Is An Alcoholic Beverage Made From The Fermentation Of Fruit, Primarily Apples. Cider Has A Long History, With Roots Dating Back Thousands Of Years, And It Has Gained Popularity In Recent Years Due To Its Refreshing Taste And Versatility. The Aroma Of Cider Is Often Bright And Fruity, Showcasing The Characteristics Of The Apples Or Other Fruits Used In Its Production.

items.name: Red Raja (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 7% ) Deep Amber To Dark Brown Lager With Ruby Highlights And A Creamy Off-White Head. Rich Malt-Forward Profile With Notes Of Toasted Bread, Caramel, And Subtle Cocoa. Full-Bodied And Smooth, Showcasing Layered Munich Malt Complexity. Low Bitterness With A Clean, Rounded Finish And A Touch Of Dark Fruit Elegance.

items.name: Rowdy Stout (250Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 6.4% ) Chocolate Milk Stout, Is A Rich And Creamy Beer Style Characterized By Its Smooth, Sweet Flavor Profile And Dark Appearance. This Style Is Brewed With Lactose A Non-Fermentable Sugar Derived From Milk, Which Contributes To Its Distinctive Sweetness And Velvety Mouthfeel And Indian Chocolate To Give A Smoth Flavor And Notes. The Flavor Profile Of Sweet Stout Is Characterized By Its Sweet, Malty Backbone. Common Flavor Notes Include Chocolate, Coffee, Caramel, And Sometimes A Subtle Nuttiness.

items.name: Huli Gun Ale ( 250Ml )
items.description: ( Abv 8% ) A Bright, Pale Belgian Ale Known For Its Elegant Strength And Lively Effervescence. It Offers Delicate Malt Sweetness Balanced By Fruity Esters Of Pear And Apple, With Subtle Spicy Notes. Despite Its High Abv, It Finishes Crisp And Dry, Making It Surprisingly Refreshing. Light-Bodied Yet Complex, With A Sparkling Mouthfeel That Enhances Its Drinkability. Perfect To Pair With Creamy, Mildly Spiced Or Grilled Indian Dishes.

items.name: Wit Maga (500Ml)
items.description: ( Abv 6.3% ) A Zesty, Citrusy And Spicy Sip, Aka Sunshine In A Mug! This Is A Traditional Wheat Beer Known For Its Hazy, Pale Appearance And Refreshing Flavor.
